title: Room
description: A Otherplane room: one splat world you can walk, plus the entryways you arrive at, the exits you leave through, and the artifacts you open. A museum is just rooms linked by exits — there is no manifest. Asset URLs resolve relative to this file's URL.

$schema.description: Path/URL to this schema (editor autocomplete only; ignored by the viewer).

display_name.description: Human name shown in the HUD, e.g. "Library".

splat_url.description: Gaussian-splat world (.spz/.ply). Resolved relative to this file.

collider_url.description: GLB collider mesh for wall/floor physics. Resolved relative to this file.

calibration.description: Marble reconstructs at an arbitrary scale; this brings the room to meters.

entryways.description: Named spawn spots. One should be id "default" (the no-fragment spawn).

id.description: Stable id; URL fragments link to it (/library/#from-study). Renaming rots links.

yaw.description: Facing direction in degrees on arrival.

exits.description: Walk up + press E to follow `to`. Dead links 404 by design.

to.description: Destination URL + #entryway. Relative within a site (../study/#from-library), absolute across sites.

artifacts.description: Walk up + interact to open `url` in a fullscreen overlay (no travel).

url.description: Web URL opened in the overlay.

vec3.description: [x, y, z] in meters, world space.
